title: Belden family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Belden family''' was one of the original settler families of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. Their members included:

*[[Orn Belden]] ([[158 BBY/Legends|160 BBY]]–[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]), eventual Senior Senator of the [[Bakuran Senate]]
*[[Eppie Belden]] (b. [[128 BBY]]), his wife and [[Invasion of Bakura|Bakuran Revolution]] leader
*[[Roviden Belden]] (d. [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]), their son, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent.

==Family tree==
 [[Eppie Belden|Eppie Antruse Belden]]--+--[[Orn Belden]]
   |
